creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Jochen, Thanks for the patch (and the heads-up!) Make sure you run make validate after you modify vuln.xml. You had trailing spaces on the

block. Version was lt 1.7.1 (which is preferred over le 1.7) not lt 1.7 The CVE is never the link I believe, always something from a project page or something like seclists. The cve is linked via the cvename. Thanks!
